name: Ben Carson
subject: President Obama's foolish Iran deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30345927:29072883381:m:1:876315805:A581BCAF32A1B46481C54861AF6CB78C:r)
---

Peter,

President Obama's nuclear deal with Iran is foolish, dangerous, and in a Carson Administration it will have no standing.

From the very beginning, this should have been dealt with as a treaty, which would have required a two-thirds majority in the U.S. Senate.

As President, I will re-establish respect for our Constitutional processes and ensure that America once again leads the world from a position of strength and clarity.

**[Will you stand with me against the Iran deal by making a secure donation today? For a donation of $35 or more, we'll send you a set of four official campaign yard signs.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30345927:29072883381:m:1:876315805:A581BCAF32A1B46481C54861AF6CB78C:r)**

America is a great country, but we are also a good country.

We should not be afraid or embarrassed of the large shadow we cast, but instead stand proud and tall for the values that made us into the pinnacle nation.

Testifying before Congress, Secretary of State Kerry warned opponents of the Iran deal that "if you think the Ayatollah's going to come back and negotiate with an American, that's fantasy. You're never going to see that because we will have proven we're not trustworthy."

America does not need to prove its trustworthiness to Iran.

The Iranian regime is the bad actor here, and they must prove their trustworthiness to the world if they truly wish to re-join the international community.

Stopping their funding of international terrorism, recognizing Israel's right to exist, and completely dismantling their nuclear program would be a start.

If you're ready to once again lead the world and stand tall for freedom, [**I hope you'll make a donation today of $35 or more to receive your official yard signs**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30345927:29072883381:m:1:876315805:A581BCAF32A1B46481C54861AF6CB78C:r), and urge everyone in your circle of influence to join our movement by signing up at [BenCarson.com](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30345928:29072883381:m:1:876315805:A581BCAF32A1B46481C54861AF6CB78C:r).

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Rand Paul
subject: They can’t get away with this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

The countdown is on until the next Republican Presidential Primary Debate next Wednesday . . .

While our national press pushes faux conservatives, I'm afraid they're doing everything possible to stamp out my message of liberty.

In fact, with less than five minutes during the last two-hour Republican Presidential debate, I had less speaking time than any other candidate in the field!

That's why I'm asking for your help to go around our national media and straight to the American people by helping me reserve airtime for my campaign's brand-new TV ad.

**[Will you agree to a generous contribution of $20.16 or more today to help me put this ad on air in key presidential primary states](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30348691:29076594093:m:1:879035888:DA357A809F96B9CDB53C897273EFE491:r)**?

With $18.3 TRILLION in national debt and new assaults on the Bill of Rights seemingly every week, our country can't afford any more of the status quo.

The good news is, with Hillary Clinton's campaign flailing, you and I have the best opportunity in years to elect a candidate to the White House who will work to destroy the very foundations of the Washington Machine.

We need a candidate who's prepared to use a sledgehammer. Not a chisel.

That's why I believe my candidacy strikes fear in the hearts of both the political establishment and the national media.

Unlike others who use blustery rhetoric to cover up Big Government records, I've taken on the Washington Machine - and won.

Just this year, you and I stopped reauthorization of Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act," which enabled the NSA's Fourth Amendment-shredding domestic spying programs.

In the wake of undercover videos showing Planned Parenthood abortionists killing unborn babies, dismembering them and selling them off for profit, we exposed every Planned Parenthood ally in the U.S. Senate with a public, roll-call vote on taxpayer funding.

My campaign has posted jaw-dropping poll numbers showing me leading Hillary Clinton in five states President Obama won in 2008 and 2012.

Even with Hillary Clinton's ongoing scandals, I'm the only candidate who can say that!

Is it any wonder our media is pushing fool's gold on the American people - while the establishment's number-one pick tries to figure out how to turn his access to deep pockets into actual support?

Fellow Conservative, my 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax Plan will blow up the tax code and return $2 TRILLION to the American people and create 1.4 million new jobs in the process. It is by far the best tax plan out there.

My plans to impose term limits on career Washington, D.C. politicians and actually force Congress to read the bills they vote on are critical steps to actually reforming Congress.

My Audit the Fed bill to finally expose corruption, cronyism and secrecy in our nation's out-of-control secret bank is critical to stopping never-ending boom-bust economic cycles that rob so many Americans blind.

My pledges to repeal 100% of ObamaCare and protect the ENTIRE Bill of Rights are critical to ensuring every American the freedom and prosperity that should be their birthright.

But it's my track-record of delivering on the promises I make that has so many scared stiff . . .

**[So I'm counting on your action right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30348691:29076594093:m:1:879035888:DA357A809F96B9CDB53C897273EFE491:r)**.

I'm counting on you to help me pay for the TV airtime the media will never give me in a debate.

Help me pay for the TV ads it will take to bring my message straight to the American people.

**[Please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30348691:29076594093:m:1:879035888:DA357A809F96B9CDB53C897273EFE491:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30348692:29076594093:m:1:879035888:DA357A809F96B9CDB53C897273EFE491:r)
---

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Protecting women and families
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

**Since it was signed into law 21 years ago, the Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) has done so much to protect women from abuse and provide critical services to survivors of domestic violence.**

Over the past two decades, VAWA has increased the number of shelters and rape crisis centers throughout the country, established a national crisis hotline, improved how the criminal justice system deals with these crimes, and provided special training to police officers.

**But even now, extremists in Congress threaten to reduce VAWA 's funding and minimize its ability to help women in need.** That's why I'm asking you to join me today in support of VAWA so we can continue to protect and aid survivors of domestic and sexual violence.

[**Stand with me today in support of a law that has helped hundreds of thousands of women across our country.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8562351242578231296/-7147192817427677184?ms=20150912e)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8562351242578231296/-7147192817427677184?ms=20150912e)
---

Here in Pennsylvania, thousands of women depend on VAWA every year. In a single day in 2014, our Commonwealth's sixty domestic violence programs served 2,498 survivors of abuse, and our hotlines answered 744 calls.1 However, more than 250 requests for services could not be met because of a lack of funds.

**Pat Toomey has repeatedly voted to weaken VAWA.** His indifference to the safety of thousands of women, children, and families is unacceptable. We need to send the message that Pennsylvania demands leaders who will put the needs of women and families first, every single time.

[**Add your voice to the fight to support the Violence Against Women Act.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8562351242578231296/-7147192817427677184?ms=20150912e)

As your Senator, I promise to always stand up for the survivors of domestic and sexual violence and to work towards the day when no one has to live in fear of abuse.

Thanks for your support,

Katie

_1\. National Network to End Domestic Violence: 2014 Domestic Violence Counts report_
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8562351242578231296/-7075135223389749248?refcode=20150912e&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

subject: Things are heating up!

body:
Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America
**Hello Friend,**
Traditionally, Labor Day marks the beginning of the ramp-up of Presidential campaigns -- and this cycle is no different. So even though we are headed into the cooler months of fall, things are heating up here at the Cruz for President campaign, and I've got some exciting updates I'd like to share with you.
This week Ted returned to the Capitol in Washington where he continued leading the fight against the disastrous Iran nuclear deal. So even though we are headed into the cooler months of fall, things are heating up here at the Cruz for President campaign, and I've got some exciting updates I'd like to share with you. This week Ted returned to the Capitol in Washington where he continued leading the fight against the disastrous Iran nuclear deal. He on Wednesday, and following the Senate's vote on Thursday, he to stop the deal that puts U.S. national security at risk. This week our campaign also make great progress in building out our coalitions and leadership teams across the nation. We launched two coalitions targeted toward young people who are being especially hammered by the Obama Administration's failed policies: "" and "." The campaign dozens of additions to our Iowa Leadership Team and the "99 Iowa Pastors" initiative. In advance of Ted's trip to Missouri this weekend, we in the Show Me State. We were also proud to announce that Kaye T. Goolsby, who served as Ted's Statewide Grassroots Chair for his race for U.S. Senate, will take on the role of for the presidential campaign to ensure we have an unrivaled grassroots network across the country. And the work that we're doing together is being noticed. This week, our campaign was endorsed by both the and . And Monica Crowley at the Washington Times for the nomination. I'd encourage you to and share it with your friends. I thank you again for your continued support. Whether it's the incredible progress we've made building out teams in early primary and caucus states, the momentum we've had raising funds, or the enthusiasm we've seen across the country wherever we've brought the campaign, none of it would be possible without your help. Jeff Roe Campaign Manager Cruz for President P.S. As a reminder, the second debate of the Presidential campaign will take place this Wednesday, September 16th. Don't forget to tune in to CNN at 8pm ET to cheer Ted on! name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Prescription drug prices are out of control
body:
#
Dear Brothers and Sisters,
Back when I was in the U.S. House, I was the first member of Congress to take constituents across the border to Canada to highlight the huge disparity between the cost of prescription drugs in the U.S. and other nations.
On that first trip were a number of women struggling with breast cancer.
I will never forget the tears in the eyes of women who were able to buy the breast cancer drug tamoxifen in Canada at one tenth of the price they were paying for that drug in the U.S.
In 2014, the pharmaceutical industry spent over $250 million on lobbying and campaign contributions -- far more than any other industry in America. This grotesque spending results in Americans paying more money for medication than anyone else in the world.
The time has come to say very loudly and very clearly that enough is enough. **The greed of the pharmaceutical industry is killing Americans. It has got to stop.**
Last year, 35 million Americans could not get their prescriptions filled because they could not afford it.
**People should not have to go without the medication they need just because their elected officials aren 't willing to challenge the drug and health care industry lobby.** Yet that is exactly what is happening.
I have a plan to change this. Last week I introduced a bill in the Senate -- and when I am president, I will work to make it law -- that will stop the soaring costs of prescription drug prices.
[**Add your name to support my plan to reduce drug prices and send a message to Congress and the prescription drug lobbyists that Americans should not die because they can't afford drugs. Click here to support my plan.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb227c/43f17890/5be55fdd/621cebf4/1809577740/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/lower_rx_costs?source=em150912rx")
My plan to reduce prescription drug prices is based around getting a better deal for the American people, and keeping drug companies in check over outrageous and unfair practices.
**Medicare should negotiate lower drug prices with the pharmaceutical industry.** Due to a provision in law written by the pharmaceutical industry, Medicare is banned from using its purchasing power to lower prescription drug prices. My plan will empower Medicare to negotiate lower costs for our seniors, and save us all money.
**Americans should be able to import drugs from Canada and other well-regulated countries.** Individuals, pharmacists, and wholesalers should be able to import prescription drugs from licensed Canadian pharmacies. Americans pay 40% more per person than Canadians for prescription drugs. Anyone in our country should be able to take advantage of those savings for medications they need.
**We need better transparency around drug costs.** Right now, the pharmaceutical industry can arbitrarily set prices for drugs, and the public has very little insight into why certain drugs cost what they do -- even though some of the research costs are often funded with U.S. taxpayer dollars. I believe that drug companies should tell us about how much drugs cost to research and develop, how much taxpayer money went towards those costs, what drugs actually cost in the United States, and how much they cost in other countries.
**Generic drugs should be widely available, and drug companies shouldn't be able to pay off competitors to keep cheaper drugs off the market.** Brand-name drugs cost, on average, 10 times as much as generics. Right now, it is a common practice for big drug companies to pay their competitors to restrict generic drugs from the public. We need to ban this practice, and make cheaper drugs readily available.
**Drug companies that break the law should face severe penalties.** If any drug company is convicted of criminal or civil fraud, they should face severe penalties including the prospect of losing their government-granted monopoly on a drug. Over the last decade, most major-branded drug makers have either settled or been convicted of fraud for violations including off-label promotion, kickbacks, anti-monopoly practices, and Medicare fraud. It's time to step up the penalties for breaking the law.
What good is it to live in the richest country on earth, if so many of our people cannot afford medications that could save their lives?
The American people are sick and tired of paying the highest prices for prescription drugs in the world. The skyrocketing prices of prescription drugs are an example of the greed of the pharmaceutical companies that has got to stop.
Now, I believe that the true solution is a national health care system that puts people ahead of profits and health ahead of special interests, and I will soon introduce legislation to provide a Medicare-for-all, single-payer system to provide health care for all Americans.
But we must also address these outrageous costs of prescription drugs, and my plan that I outlined here will do that.
[**Say you want to take on the prescription drug companies by adding your name to support my plan. Click here to take action now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb227c/43f17890/5be55fdd/621cebf4/1809577740/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/lower_rx_costs?source=em150912rx")
Thank you for all you do.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
